stem: Each of the protocols below is best known for one job on the network.
review_notes: Match the four protocols to their primary purpose. Right column has one distractor.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Match each protocol to the job it does.

right: Fetches web pages from a server
Transfers files between client and server
Provides reliable, ordered delivery of packets
Translates domain names to IP addresses

misconceptions.label: DNS confused with TCP
misconceptions.description: Domain → IP translation is DNS, the distractor in the right column. TCP is about delivery guarantees.
